name_en: Clos Lucé – Leonardo da Vinci's Home

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Leonardo da Vinci's bedroom is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la chambre de Léonard de Vinci ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah SHAHM-bruh duh lay-oh-NAR duh VAN-see
phrases.cultural_note: Leonardo spent the last three years of his life at Clos Lucé, invited by King François I. He died here in 1519.

responses.english: On the first floor, on the right.
responses.phonetic: oh pruh-MYAY ay-TAHZH, soor lah DRWAHT
responses.french: Au premier étage, sur la droite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the models of Leonardo's inventions
phrases.text_local: Où sont exposées les maquettes des inventions de Léonard de Vinci ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo son eks-poh-ZAY lay mah-KET day zan-von-SYON duh lay-oh-NAR duh VAN-see
phrases.cultural_note: The château displays 40 scale models of Leonardo's machines, reconstructed from his notebooks by IBM engineers in the 1980s.

responses.english: On the ground floor and in the park.
responses.phonetic: oh ray-duh-shoh-SAY ay dahn luh PARK
responses.french: Au rez-de-chaussée et dans le parc.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to the gardens
phrases.cultural_note: The park around Clos Lucé features large-scale reproductions of Leonardo's machines in a scenic garden setting.

responses.english: Through the exit at the back, on the left.
responses.phonetic: par lah sor-TEE oh FOHN, ah GOHSH
responses.french: Par la sortie au fond, à gauche.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a combined ticket with the Château Royal
phrases.text_local: Existe-t-il un billet combiné avec le Château Royal ?
phrases.pronunciation: eg-ZEEST-teel uhn bee-YEH kohm-bee-NAY ah-VEK luh shah-TOH rwah-YAL
phrases.cultural_note: Combined tickets covering Clos Lucé and the Château Royal d'Amboise are available; ask at either ticket office.

responses.english: Yes, ask at the ticket office.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the last entry is
phrases.cultural_note: Clos Lucé is open year-round; closing times vary by season. The garden is illuminated on select evenings during summer.
